## 🚀 IMMEDIATE DEPLOYMENT SEQUENCE

### **Step 1: Acquire Domain (5 minutes)**
```bash
# Option A: Free subdomain
Deploy to: Railway.app → phoenix-agi.railway.app

# Option B: Professional domain ($10)
Buy: phoenixagi.com from Namecheap
```

### **Step 2: Deploy Backend (10 minutes)**
```bash
# Navigate to deployment directory
cd /mnt/user-data/outputs/phoenix-agi-webapp/backend

# Install dependencies
pip install -r requirements.txt

# Set minimum required API key
export GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY="your-key-here"

# Deploy to Railway
railway up

# OR deploy to Render
render deploy
```

### **Step 3: Test System (5 minutes)**
```bash
# Test health endpoint
curl https://your-domain.com/health

# Test chat endpoint
curl -X POST https://your-domain.com/api/chat/query \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"query":"test","user_id":"test","session_id":"test"}'
```

### **Step 4: Share (1 minute)**
```bash
# Post to social media
"Phoenix AGI is live: [your-domain]
Multi-AI synthesis in action.
Try it and see the future of AI."
```
